description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - DeFiCh/go-ethlibs that runs on push to master, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow consists of two jobs: build and node-rpc-tests. The build job runs in a defi/ain-builder:latest container, checks out the code, populates the environment, sets up dependencies, builds binaries, and uploads them as artifacts. The node-rpc-tests job depends on the build job, downloads the binaries and shell commands, sets up permissions, test fixtures, and Go, checks out the go-ethlibs repository, and runs EVM RPC tests.
